findings.description: The cross-reference to the upstream batch spec is reproduced verbatim using RST syntax (`:doc:`../../04_Explanation_batch/01_userDeleteBatchSpec``) inside a Markdown section. This RST directive will not render as a link in a Markdown context and may confuse an AI reading the file.
findings.source_evidence: Source note: 「ユーザ情報削除バッチの仕様は、\ :doc:`../../04_Explanation_batch/01_userDeleteBatchSpec`\ を参照すること。」 — the :doc: directive is RST-specific syntax that has no meaning outside RST rendering.
